title: ANIMAL ADOPTION - 211info
text: SAFEHAVEN HUMANE SOCIETY ANIMAL ADOPTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an opportunity to adopt animals, all of which have been spayed and neutered. This is a no-kill shelter. The society also has a food bank that provides pet food for low-income pet owners. 32220 Old Highway 34 Tangent, OR 973899770 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Animal Intake: by Appointment Only 7 days per week noon-5pm Pet food bank 2nd and 4th Wednesday of the month 9am-11am Email (541) 928-2789 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 928-2789 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: Varies by service. Sliding scale and pro bono available. DOCUMENTS: Call for information AREA SERVED: Linn County Services: Animal Adoption Animal Shelters Other Services Offered At This Location: DOMESTIC ANIMAL SERVICES - PET FOOD PANTRY DOMESTIC ANIMAL SERVICES - PET WELLNESS CLINIC DOMESTIC ANIMAL SERVICES - PETS ARE FAMILY FUND If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SAFEHAVEN HUMANE SOCIETY
